home.heroSubtitle: Choose with confidence using a real racket dataset: ARS prices, local stock, clear specs and recommendations tailored to your game.
home.featureCompareText: See up to 4 rackets side by side and spot real differences in shape, balance, materials and price.
home.featureFinderText: We build your player profile through practical questions and return explained recommendations, not generic tips.
home.featurePricesText: Track local store prices to make decisions with real market context in Argentina.
home.trust1: Real catalog rackets, no invented picks
home.trust3: Local context: ARS prices and stock
home.step1Text: Level, style, pace and goals: we assemble a useful profile before recommending.
home.step2Text: We search our database and prioritize options that actually exist with local price context.
home.step3Text: Receive 3 to 5 rackets with reasons you can understand, not a black-box answer.
home.finalCtaTitle: Your next racket should not be a guess
home.finalCtaText: Let us help you choose, or compare manually. Either way, you'll decide with data and technical clarity.

paddles.title: Padel rackets
paddles.subtitle: {count} rackets with normalized specs and prices in pesos

detail.noPrices: We don't have store prices for this racket yet.

compare.title: Racket comparator
compare.subtitle: Up to 4 rackets side by side
compare.empty: Pick rackets from the list using the "Compare" button.
compare.emptyRich: Put up to 4 rackets side by side and see the real differences in shape, balance, materials and price. Start by adding rackets from the list.
compare.howStep1: Tap "Compare" on any racket in the list
compare.howStep2: Add up to 4 rackets to face them off
compare.howStep3: We highlight where they differ so you decide better
compare.barText: {count, plural, one {# racket selected} other {# rackets selected}}
compare.limitReached: You can compare up to {max} rackets.
compare.tableCaption: Comparison table of selected racket specs and best price
compare.diffLegend: We highlight the rows where the rackets differ.

finder.title: Find my racket
finder.subtitle: Answer a few questions and we'll recommend real rackets for your game.
finder.qStyle: How would you describe your style?
finder.qFrequency: How many times a week do you play?
finder.qMatchPace: How fast are your usual matches?
finder.qInjuries: Any elbow, shoulder or wrist discomfort?
finder.qInjuryZone: Where do you feel it most often?
finder.qStrength: Do you want the racket to add power, or do you generate it yourself?
finder.strengthNeeds: I want the racket to help
finder.qGoal: What do you want to improve?
finder.qSweetSpot: What sweet spot tolerance do you prefer?
finder.qPrevious: Which racket do you use today? (optional)
finder.budgetRangeError: Maximum can't be lower than minimum.
finder.budgetOptional: Leave fields empty if you have no limit.
finder.thinking: Analyzing your profile and searching real rackets…
finder.thinking1: Analyzing your level and play style…
finder.thinking2: Filtering through hundreds of real rackets…
finder.thinking3: Matching specs, prices and your budget…
finder.budgetExpanded: There were few options in your budget, so we widened the range up to {max} to show you these alternatives.
finder.budgetRemoved: We found no options in your budget, so we're showing the best ones for your profile without filtering by price.
finder.error: Something went wrong getting recommendations. Try again.
finder.noResults: We found no rackets for that profile and budget. Try widening the range.

admin.title: Admin panel
admin.scrapingHint: Long runs are better executed via CLI or cron; this button is for short runs.

footer.tagline: The padel racket comparator and choosing assistant built for Argentina.
footer.dataAttribution: Specs and prices gathered from official brand sites and Argentine stores. Prices may vary; check the store before buying.
footer.rights: Made with love for the padel community.

meta.title: PaletaIQ — Find your perfect padel racket
meta.description: Padel racket comparator and AI-powered finder with prices in Argentine pesos.
